verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You have gone ahead to make a place for me Though here below You've left a taste of what will be When I get Home, When I get Home Here below I’ve tasted sadness tasted pain But there with You the Prince of Peace I’ll ever reign When I get home, when I get home For where You are is where I want to be And where You are is all the heaven I will need

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For here below the Lamb is light For me there is no night Just endless glory bright Just like my heavenly home But when I walk the streets of gold more grand than I was told When Jesus I behold I’ll know I’m home

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Here below I’ve tasted death and tasted strife But there a river flows of purest crystal life When I get home, when I get home And here below You are the sweetest taste I know But one day soon I’ll taste the glory round Your throne When I get home, when I get home For where You are is where I want to be And where You are is all the heaven I will need

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Children I can’t wait till that day When I call you to my side I’ve been building a special for you with me And I can’t wait for you to see I can’t wait to say well done my good and faithful servant Well done you’ve fought a good fight And I can’t wait to say, Father this is my bride, The day that I take you to my side Oh, I can’t wait till the day that I take you my precious bride
